parameters.query: SELECT d.document_id, d.client_id, d.document_uuid, d.original_filename, d.storage_path, d.category, d.priority, d.validation_score, d.status, d.validation_errors, d.validation_warnings, de.result_data, de.confidence_score, d.received_at, d.updated_at FROM documents d LEFT JOIN document_extractions de ON d.document_id = de.document_id WHERE d.status IN ('validation_failed', 'pending_manual_review', 'classified_low_confidence') ORDER BY d.priority DESC, d.received_at ASC LIMIT 25;
INSERT INTO notifications (client_id, notification_type, message, priority, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, 'document_review_overdue', $2, 'high', 'unread', NOW(), NOW());

UPDATE documents SET status = 'in_human_review', review_priority = $1, review_reason = $2, review_instructions = $3, sla_deadline = $4, review_started_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE document_id = $5;

INSERT INTO workflow_executions (client_id, workflow_name, workflow_id, execution_id, status, input_data, output_data, started_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'completed', $5, $6, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO reports (client_id, report_type, report_name, generated_data, generated_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (1, 'document_review_queue', 'Human Review Queue Summary', $1, NOW(), NOW(), NOW());
